rationale.R1.6: The revision improves clarity and reduces wordiness, but retains some minor hedging.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies uncertainty regarding specific numerical results, but doesn't fully quantify it for all claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revision focuses on the provided paragraph and does not stray into discussing other aspects of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: The revision avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision lacks source annotations or explanations for the changes made.
